content:
It will be great to test new lints (especially across versions), to create reproducers for issues, to check which versions support which lints, and so on. It is under "Tools".

Example from one of the maintainers: https://godbolt.org/z/TWYsEbche

https://github.com/compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer/issues/2562
https://github.com/compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer/pull/7477
